metadata.title: Sahakum
metadata.description: Community map to share and rate places

map.locationDeniedMessage: Location access was denied. The map stays centered on Lima.
map.locationUnavailableMessage: We could not get your current location. The map stays centered on Lima.
map.zoneCreatePointHint: Click on the map to pick the center point.
map.zoneCreatePolygonHint: Click on the map to add vertices (minimum 3).
map.zoneCreateNameRequired: You must enter a name for the zone.
map.zoneCreatePointRequired: You must select one point on the map.
map.zoneCreatePolygonRequired: You must add at least 3 points for the polygon.
map.zoneCreateFailedFallback: Unable to create zone. Please try again.

auth.contributionsComingSoon: This section will be available soon.
